"D:\Program Files (x86)\cmake-4.0.0-rc4-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Student_Management.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files (x86)\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\Student_Management.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Student_Management.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files (x86)\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Student_Management.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Student_Management.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStudent_Management.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Student_Management.dir\linkLibs.rsp
